seo.meta_description: Transparent pricing for teams of every size. Start free, scale as you grow.

hero.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.sub_headline: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No surprise invoices.

features.title: Unlimited Content Types
features.description: Model your content without artificial limits on types, fields, or depth.

features.title: Global CDN
features.description: All plans include multi-region content delivery with automatic SSL.

features.title: REST & GraphQL APIs
features.description: Choose the API style that fits your stack. Both are fully supported.

features.title: Community Support
features.description: Access to documentation, community forums, and example projects.

cta_banner.heading: Need a custom plan?
cta_banner.body_text: Enterprise plans include SSO, audit logs, SLA, and dedicated support. Let's design a plan that fits.
